title: Next button
scenario: Onboarding wizard Next button advances through all six screens correctly in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Observe the onboarding wizard appears (if first launch or after reset).
On Step 1 of the onboarding wizard, tap the 'Next' button.
Verify the app advances to Step 2.
Verify the app advances to Step 3.
Verify the app advances to Step 4.
Verify the app advances to Step 5.
Verify the app advances to Step 6 (final screen).
On Step 6, tap the 'Next' or 'Get Started' button.
Verify the app exits the onboarding wizard and navigates to the Home screen.
expected: Tapping 'Next' on each onboarding screen advances to the subsequent screen sequentially from Step 1 through Step 6, and on the final screen, tapping 'Next'/'Get Started' exits the wizard to the Home screen.
